title: Ubiquiti Pro Max 16 Rack Mount
description: With the mounting kit, you can mount your Ubiquiti devices (Switch Pro Max and Pro Max PoE) into a 19" rack with a 1U height. The kit fits only one device Ubiquiti UniFi switch USW-Pro-Max-16 Ubiquiti UniFi switch USW-Pro-Max-16-PoE 1U RackMount kit including a power supply box Set of screws for rack mounting
